category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Bangladesh BSTI certification, BDS/IEC standards, and SREDA energy labelling requirements.

title.en: China-to-Bangladesh Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入孟加拉国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入孟加拉：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Bangladesh BSTI mandatory certification, BDS/IEC 60335-2-24 safety, SREDA energy labelling, and refrigerant (R-600a) requirements for import via Chattogram and Mongla.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与孟加拉国BSTI强制认证、BDS/IEC 60335-2-24安全、SREDA能效标识及制冷剂（R-600a）要求差距对照，适用于经吉大港与蒙格拉港进口。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與孟加拉BSTI強制認證、BDS/IEC 60335-2-24安全、SREDA能效標識及製冷劑（R-600a）要求差距對照，適用於經吉大港與蒙格拉港進口。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Bangladesh legislation, BSTI certification marking requirements, BDS standards, SREDA energy-labelling rules, and import-permit provisions with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行孟加拉国法律、BSTI认证标识要求、BDS标准、SREDA能效标识规则及进口许可条款。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行孟加拉法律、BSTI認證標識要求、BDS標準、SREDA能效標識規則及進口許可條款。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four major Bangladesh compliance gaps: (1) BSTI mandatory certification mark — products on Bangladesh's compulsory-certification list require a BSTI Certification Mark (CM) licence before import and sale, assessed against the relevant Bangladesh Standard (BDS), which typically adopts IEC 60335-2-24; Chinese CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted; (2) energy efficiency — Bangladesh operates a star-rating energy label programme under SREDA (Sustainable and Renewable Energy Development Authority) distinct from China's GB 12021.2 grades; (3) electrical interface — Bangladesh uses 220 V / 50 Hz (same 50 Hz as China; China's single-phase nominal is similar but its three-phase is 380 V), plus type-D/G/K-style sockets, requiring plug and labelling adaptation; and (4) an in-country importer/Letter of Credit and import-permit chain is required. R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned but charge documentation against IEC 60335-2-24 must be verified. Bangladesh has no EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regime.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大孟加拉国合规差距：（1）BSTI强制认证标志——列入孟加拉国强制认证清单的产品在进口和销售前须取得BSTI认证标志（CM）许可，依据相应的孟加拉国标准（BDS）评定，BDS通常采用IEC 60335-2-24；中国CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被接受；（2）能效——孟加拉国由SREDA（可持续与可再生能源发展局）运营星级能效标识计划，区别于中国GB 12021.2等级；（3）电气接口——孟加拉国采用220 V/50 Hz（与中国同为50 Hz；中国单相标称值相近，但其三相为380 V），并使用D/G/K型插座，需进行插头与标识适配；（4）须具备本地进口商/信用证及进口许可链条。R-600a制冷剂条件良好，但须核实充注量文件是否符合IEC 60335-2-24。孟加拉国没有欧盟式的横向RoHS、电池或室外噪声法规。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大孟加拉合規差距：（1）BSTI強制認證標誌——列入孟加拉強制認證清單的產品在進口和銷售前須取得BSTI認證標誌（CM）許可，依據相應的孟加拉標準（BDS）評定，BDS通常採用IEC 60335-2-24；中國CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被接受；（2）能效——孟加拉由SREDA（可持續與可再生能源發展局）運營星級能效標識計畫，區別於中國GB 12021.2等級；（3）電氣介面——孟加拉採用220 V/50 Hz（與中國同為50 Hz；中國單相標稱值相近，但其三相為380 V），並使用D/G/K型插座，需進行插頭與標識適配；（4）須具備本地進口商/信用證及進口許可鏈條。R-600a製冷劑條件良好，但須核實充注量文件是否符合IEC 60335-2-24。孟加拉沒有歐盟式的橫向RoHS、電池或室外噪聲法規。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred.
